retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the kfree_skb call is part of a drop operation; after dropping the skb it is freed and cannot be retried.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of this function is to check various CAN device conditions and decide whether to drop an skb, updating statistics and logging messages. Refcount management (kfree_skb) is only one step within a larger conditional drop path, not the main objective.
